tasks.name: Create empty-states directory
tasks.purpose: Set up dedicated folder for empty state visual components to maintain organized component architecture

constraints: Follow existing _components directory pattern
Create subdirectory for visual placeholder components

tasks.input_state: _components directory exists with existing widget components
tasks.output_state: _components/empty-states/ directory created and ready for outline components
tasks.verification_command: test -d apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/empty-states && echo '✓ Directory exists' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create RadialProgressOutline component
tasks.purpose: Provide visual placeholder showing 0% radial chart outline with dashed stroke for Course Progress empty state

constraints: Match RadialProgress SVG structure with dashed stroke
0% progress state (no fill on progress circle)
Responsive sizing to fit EmptyState card
Dark mode support via Tailwind classes

tasks.input_state: empty-states directory exists, RadialProgress component available as reference
tasks.output_state: RadialProgressOutline component renders 0% radial chart with dashed stroke in empty state context
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders SVG circle with strokeDasharray for dashed appearance and shows 0% in center

tasks.name: Add Course Progress empty state logic

action.target: empty state conditional rendering to course-progress-chart

tasks.purpose: Display engaging empty state with RadialProgressOutline, messaging, and CTA when user has no course progress

files: S1890.I3.F2 feature document describes course-progress-chart.tsx structure
constraints: Check if completionPercentage === 0 or data is null/undefined
Heading: 'Start your learning journey'
Description: 'Complete lessons to track your progress here'
CTA: 'Begin Course' linking to /home/course
Render RadialProgressOutline above EmptyState text
Use Card wrapper consistent with populated state

tasks.input_state: course-progress-chart component exists per S1890.I3.F2, RadialProgressOutline component available
tasks.output_state: course-progress-chart displays empty state with outline, messaging, and working CTA link when progress is 0%
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders when completionPercentage is 0, contains heading 'Start your learning journey', and has link to /home/course
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Start your learning journey' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/course-progress-chart.tsx && grep -q '/home/course' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/course-progress-chart.tsx && grep -q 'RadialProgressOutline' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/course-progress-chart.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create SpiderWebOutline component
tasks.purpose: Provide visual placeholder showing pentagon radar grid with dashed lines and no data points for Skills Spider empty state

dependencies: RadarChart (as RechartsRadarChart), PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis from recharts
constraints: Use Recharts RadarChart with PolarGrid only (no Radar data layer)
Show 5 axis labels for 5S dimensions (placeholder labels)
Dashed stroke style via strokeDasharray on PolarGrid
No data points or filled areas
Responsive sizing with aspect-square and max-h-[250px]

tasks.input_state: empty-states directory exists, RadarChart component available as reference
tasks.output_state: SpiderWebOutline component renders pentagon radar grid with dashed lines and 5 axis labels
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders RadarChart with PolarGrid but no Radar data layer, uses strokeDasharray for dashed effect

tasks.name: Add Skills Spider empty state logic

action.target: empty state conditional rendering to skills-spider-diagram

tasks.purpose: Display engaging empty state with SpiderWebOutline, messaging, and CTA when user has no skills assessment data

files: S1890.I3.F1 feature document describes skills-spider-diagram.tsx structure
constraints: Check if categoryScores is empty object or null/undefined
Heading: 'Discover your presentation strengths'
Description: 'Take the skills assessment to reveal your 5S profile'
CTA: 'Take Assessment' linking to /home/assessment
Render SpiderWebOutline above EmptyState text
Use Card wrapper consistent with populated state

tasks.input_state: skills-spider-diagram component exists per S1890.I3.F1, SpiderWebOutline component available
tasks.output_state: skills-spider-diagram displays empty state with outline, messaging, and working CTA link when no assessment data exists
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders when categoryScores is empty, contains heading 'Discover your presentation strengths', and has link to /home/assessment
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Discover your presentation strengths' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/skills-spider-diagram.tsx && grep -q '/home/assessment' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/skills-spider-diagram.tsx && grep -q 'SpiderWebOutline' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/skills-spider-diagram.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Verify dark mode support

action.target: dark mode rendering for both empty states

tasks.purpose: Ensure empty states render correctly with proper contrast and styling in dark mode

constraints: All empty state components use semantic Tailwind classes that adapt to dark mode
SVG strokes and fills use currentColor or semantic classes
EmptyState component already supports dark mode via border-border
Test by toggling theme in browser DevTools

tasks.input_state: Both empty states implemented in course-progress-chart and skills-spider-diagram
tasks.output_state: Both empty states verified to render correctly in dark mode with proper contrast
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Manual verification: toggle dark mode in browser and confirm both empty states remain readable with proper contrast
tasks.verification_command: grep -E 'text-(muted-)?foreground|bg-background|border-border|currentColor' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/empty-states/*.tsx | wc -l | xargs -I {} test {} -gt 0 && echo '✓ Uses semantic colors' && pnpm typecheck
